topic: Brut Nature and no added dosage
trigger_keywords: sin adicion de licor de expedicion

steps.label: cause
steps.text: After disgorgement, the producer chooses not to add sugar in the liqueur d'expedition.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Without dosage, the final sweetness is not increased; only naturally remaining residual sugar contributes to the measured level.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine may be labelled Brut Nature or Zero Dosage when it meets the applicable residual-sugar limit, typically 0-3 g/L.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The wine may be labelled Brut Nature or Zero Dosage when it meets the applicable residual-sugar limit, typically 0-3 g/L.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
